nodes.text: Another adventurer. Let me guess — you need something.
I brew potions. Powerful ones. But I need ingredients.
Bring me a Giant Mushroom from the woods. I've been craving mushroom stew for weeks.
A Giant Mushroom! Perfect. The stew will be magnificent.
Here, take this Torch. The dark caves north of here are impossible to navigate without light. Don't ask how I know.
Enjoy the torch. Mind the spiders in the caves. They don't like light. Or goblins. Or anything really.
